title: Cymatic Planner FAIL: plan is valid but compiled_control_witness_hash is wrong (REPLAY_INCONSISTENCY)
_fixture_purpose: Demonstrates REPLAY_INCONSISTENCY: the planner correctly finds flat→stripes→hexagons in k=2 (plan execution succeeds), and correctly references the hexagon control cert by ID, but provides an incorrect compiled_control_witness_hash (all zeros instead of ef54d9c3...). The validator finds the cert on disk, recomputes its hash, detects the mismatch, and emits REPLAY_INCONSISTENCY. This proves the validator checks compilation integrity, not just plan validity: a correct plan with a forged or stale hash still fails. QA analogue: a generator sequence that reaches the correct orbit but whose certificate chain is broken — the witness is unverifiable even if the computation succeeded.

qa_mapping.planning_qa_analogue: Plan execution reached cosmos orbit correctly (hexagons). However the compilation link is broken: the declared compiled_control_witness_hash (all zeros) does not match the actual hash of the referenced control cert. The certificate chain is unverifiable. In QA terms: the orbit was reached but the generator sequence cannot be proven to correspond to the pinned certified controller — the proof of correspondence is invalid even though the computation succeeded.

validation_checks.details: bfs in {bfs, dfs, astar, dijkstra, iddfs}

validation_checks.description: every plan step is a legal edge in control_graph
observed final pattern class matches target pattern class
no disordered/out_of_orbit state visited in plan
validation_checks.details: plan visits only flat, stripes, hexagons

validation_checks.description: compiled control cert hash matches and semantic fields consistent
validation_checks.details: cert qa.cert.cymatics.control.hexagon_reachable.v1 found; hash mismatch: claimed=0000000000000000... actual=ef54d9c38ca3dfd0... — REPLAY_INCONSISTENCY

fail_ledger.message: compiled_control_witness_hash=0000...0000 does not match the actual SHA-256 of qa.cert.cymatics.control.hexagon_reachable.v1 (actual: ef54d9c38ca3dfd04e750aa993077768e4f17de3ab9226b82b5f3f1633ec8d12). The compilation link between the planner cert and the control cert is broken. The plan execution reached hexagons correctly, but the proof that this plan corresponds to the referenced certified controller is invalid. Possible causes: stale hash from a prior version of the control cert, or the wrong control cert was referenced.
